     def forward(self, logits, targets):

         return self.ce(logits + self.adjustment.unsqueeze(0), targets)

+

+

+class ClassBalancedCELoss(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, class_counts, beta=0.9999, label_smoothing=0.0):

+        super().__init__()

+        counts = torch.tensor(class_counts, dtype=torch.float32)

+        effective_num = 1.0 - torch.pow(torch.tensor(beta, dtype=torch.float32), counts)

+        weights = (1.0 - beta) / (effective_num + 1e-12)

+        weights = weights / weights.sum() * len(class_counts)

+        self.register_buffer("weights", weights)

+        self.label_smoothing = label_smoothing

+

+    def forward(self, logits, targets):

+        return nn.functional.cross_entropy(

+            logits,

+            targets,

+            weight=self.weights,

+            label_smoothing=self.label_smoothing,

+        )

 

 

 def make_transforms(img_size=224):

@@ -93,10 +112,22 @@
     return acc, bacc

 

 

+def build_criterion(args, class_counts, epoch):

+    if args.loss_name == "logit_adjust":

+        return LogitAdjustedLoss(class_counts, tau=args.tau, label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+    if args.loss_name == "cb_ce":

+        return ClassBalancedCELoss(class_counts, beta=args.cb_beta, label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+    if args.loss_name == "drw_cb_ce":

+        if epoch < args.drw_start_epoch:

+            return nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+        return ClassBalancedCELoss(class_counts, beta=args.cb_beta, label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+    return nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+

+
